title: Find Missing and Repeated Values
titleCn: 找出缺失和重复的数字

testcases.input: grid = [[1,3],[2,2]] Output: [2,4] Explanation: Number 2 is repeated and number 4 is missing so the answer is [2,4].
testcases.expectedOutput: [2,4] Explanation: Number 2 is repeated and number 4 is missing so the answer is [2,4].

testcases.input: grid = [[9,1,7],[8,9,2],[3,4,6]] Output: [9,5] Explanation: Number 9 is repeated and number 5 is missing so the answer is [9,5].
testcases.expectedOutput: [9,5] Explanation: Number 9 is repeated and number 5 is missing so the answer is [9,5].
